scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=server && npm run typecheck --workspace=client
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspace=shared && npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace=server
scripts.dev:client: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace=client
